# ScroogeLLM

> A local VS Code proxy that cuts LLM API costs — prompt compression, response caching, and smart model routing — and shows every penny saved in your status bar. Your code stays on your machine. Free. Built by AI Clarity.

ScroogeLLM is a free VS Code extension that sits between your editor and your LLM provider as a local proxy. It measures what AI costs, then trims it: compressing prompts to drop wasted tokens, caching responses so you don't pay twice for the same request, and routing to the right model. Savings are surfaced live in the status bar.

## Core concepts

- Local proxy: runs on your machine; code and prompts are not exfiltrated.
- Measurement first: see what AI costs before and after optimization — savings shown in the status bar.
- Prompt compression: trims wasted tokens from outgoing requests.
- Response caching: avoids repeat charges for identical requests.
- Smart model routing: sends each request to a cost-appropriate model.

## Links

- Home: https://scroogellm.com
- Source (GitHub): https://github.com/harvest316/minspec
